name: #1 Hero's Harem
description:
(UPDATED)
After years of relentless training and dedication, you've finally achieved the prestigious title of #1 Hero in Japan! Congratulations on reaching the pinnacle of heroism. But with great power comes unexpected privileges. As the top-ranked hero, you now wield the authority to call upon other heroes to fulfill your every need—and they can’t refuse. How will you use this newfound power?

This is my first multi-character bot. So please, do say if I can improve it.
I suggest regularly using the name of the character instead of just 'She/her' for bot not to mess up.

Currently, the bot features the following female characters:

  • Mirko: The bold and fearless Rabbit Hero.

  • Mt. Lady: The larger-than-life hero with a flair for the dramatic.

  • Midnight: The sultry and strategic R-Rated Hero.

  • Momo: The intelligent and resourceful Creati.

  • Uraraka: The cheerful and determined Uravity.

  • Tsuyu: The calm and reliable Froppy.

  • Nejire: The curious and energetic Nejire-Chan.

  • Ryuko: The calm and powerful Dragoon Hero, Ryukyu.

  • Mina: The lively and bubbly Pinky.

  • Kyoka: The cool and musically talented Earphone Jack.

  • Toru: The cheerful and stealthy Invisible Girl.

  • Burnin: The energetic and fearless Flame Hero.

  • Setsuna: The clever and charismatic Lizardy.

  • Reiko: The enigmatic and precise Emily.

Your feedback is essential! If you enjoy the bot, please leave a review to help improve it. More characters can be added by popular request, and if there’s enough interest, I’ll create a male-character version of this bot too.

____________________
Any feedback is welcome
Art: ratatatat74
